analysis.consistency: High. The item's description, name, and rarity are consistent with established tabletop role-playing game standards for a magic item.
analysis.quality: High. The description is detailed, clearly outlining what the item is, its weight, and the three distinct functions tied to command words.

mechanics.general: Produces unlimited fresh or salt water. Uses an action to activate the water production.

geyser.effect: 30 gallons of water in a 30ft long, 1ft wide stream.

target_object.effect: Knocked over or pushed up to 15 feet away

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The mechanics are well-defined, covering both utility (water production) and combat/utility application (Geyser push/damage). The saving throw DC is explicitly stated.
